description_long: This lounge object features a striking geometric design, with a broad, elliptical base composed of interlocking, triangular latticework that creates a visually dynamic texture. Atop the base sits a series of rectangular and square modules, some with ribbed or slatted surfaces, in shades of blue and gray, suggesting a modular seating arrangement. The upper modules are arranged in a grid-like fashion, with varying heights and depths, providing both seating and possible reclining areas. The overall structure appears to be made from a combination of metal and composite materials, giving it a modern, industrial aesthetic. The surface of the base is patterned with alternating light and dark triangles, enhancing its visual complexity. The lounge is likely designed for outdoor urban environments, offering both functional seating and a sculptural presence.
description: A modern lounge with a geometric, elliptical base and modular blue-gray seating sections, featuring a striking triangular lattice pattern and ribbed surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the layered, elliptical base and the modular seating units with ribbed and flat surfaces on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, patterned base and the linear arrangement of the seating modules.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the seating modules and the full extent of the triangular lattice pattern on the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the continuous geometric pattern and the alignment of the seating modules from another angle.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple rectangular seat cushions arranged in a grid, attached to the top surface; cushions vary in height and depth, forming a modular seating area.
attribute_backrest_design: Backrests are integrated as raised sections of the seat modules, with a ribbed texture and moderate height, forming a segmented, modern profile.
attribute_armrest_presence: No visible armrests; seating modules are open on the sides.
attribute_leg_style: No distinct legs; the lounge rests directly on its broad, elliptical base, which is patterned and slightly elevated from the ground.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery features a ribbed and slatted texture on the seat and backrest modules, while the base displays a bold geometric triangular pattern.
